title: Flat Key Signatures
description: Learn the order of flats and how to identify major keys from F to Db.

sessions.title: BEAD Greatest Common Factor
sessions.description: Learn the exact order that flats appear in a key signature.

sessions.title: The Second-to-Last Trick
sessions.description: Learn the shortcut to identify any flat major key.

levels.criteria: Can instantly name a major key by looking at its flat signature.
